title: Meatballs bar
description:
Craving something different? The Meatball Hunger Bar resource pack replaces your hunger indicator with tasty meatballs. Plus, it plays nicely with the AppleSkin mod.

Features:
body:
Meatballs Bar is a delightful Minecraft resource pack that transforms your hunger indicator into juicy meatballs! No more boring old hunger icons—now you’ll be craving a hearty meal every time you check your hunger status. Plus, this pack seamlessly integrates with the popular AppleSkin mod, providing additional information about your saturation and exhaustion levels. Whether you’re exploring caves, building epic structures, or battling mobs, keep an eye on those savory meatballs to stay fueled up!

Features:
|Replaces the default hunger bar with mouthwatering meatballs.
|Supports the AppleSkin mod, displaying accurate saturation and exhaustion values.
|Minimalistic and clean design—perfect for a clutter-free HUD.

Bon appétit! 🍝
